name: layeraxis-v4-5agent
description: SPEC V4 gated article illustration workflow with lock, outline, scene, prompt, and render stages.

interface.shortDescription: Run a gated multi-stage illustration workflow.
interface.longDescription: LayerAxis V4 5-Agent exposes the legacy SPEC V4 gated workflow for Codex. It splits article illustration into lock, outline, scene, prompt, and render stages for inspection and replay.
defaultPrompt: Run the SPEC V4 illustration workflow.
Render the SPEC V4 prompt files.
